evidence_summary: Cluster POL-331 completed five children (POL-326 through POL-330) implementing the Medic role, Chart system, Navigation Before Retrieval doctrine lint, seed-instructions updates, and closeout-librarian skill refinements. Drift reconciliation found POLARIS.md and SUMMARY.md were stale across smartdocs/, src/, src/cli/, and src/types/ (the types folder had draft-only content). Updated four POLARIS.md files and four SUMMARY.md files to reflect: the medic/charts/ directory in smartdocs/, the new medic/ and lint/ route folders in src/, the medic command group in src/cli/, and the result-packet.ts types in src/types/. No documents required ingestion; no cognition notes were archived. All links in updated files validated successfully. Librarian commit sha: a68a1b6.
